description: A wide graphic on a dark background with a faint enlarged Department of Homeland Security seal watermark. The small DHS seal and U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services wordmark sit at the upper left. Bold white text reads NEWS RELEASE, with an italic serif headline below reading USCIS Announces Results of Operation Twin Shield, a Large-Scale Immigration Fraud Investigation.
notable_text: NEWS RELEASE; USCIS Announces Results of Operation Twin Shield, a Large-Scale Immigration Fraud Investigation
